macro.title: Why Fed President Beth Hammack wants more rate hikes
macro.what: Oil is near $70, but Fed hawks cite sticky inflation and full employment, keeping rate hikes in play and mortgage rates from falling.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: A Tale of Two Markets: Luxury Home Prices Are Rising 3 Times Faster Than Non-Luxury Prices
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Americans Across Party Lines Back Policies to Improve Housing Affordability: Redfin Survey
macro.what: Most Republicans and Democrats believe there should be federal policies in place to make housing more affordable, according to a recent Redfin survey
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Trump calls 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act ‘a yawn’
housing.what: The comments came as Trump reinforced prioritization of the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act as his top domestic priority.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: MRED seeks arbitration in Zillow antitrust lawsuit
housing.what: MRED asked the court to compel arbitration with Zillow and stay claims ahead of a 2 day hearing on a preliminary injunction motion.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: CRMLS adds ‘Limited Exposure Coming Soon’ listing option
housing.what: CRMLS launched 'Limited Exposure Coming Soon' listings, letting sellers set Internet display to No and exclude listings from IDX feeds.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Joe Rath: Rocket Redfin integration gains momentum one year after $1.75B deal
housing.what: Rocket says Redfin integration is ahead of plan after the $1.75B deal, citing 75% of sellers would move if friction fell.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Seller Choice Keeps Winning, Quietly
housing.what: CRMLS, the largest real estate listing service in the country, just gave home sellers a more flexible way to bring their home to the market before it is broadly launched across the internet
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: 19% of of House Hunters Are Looking to Relocate–And They’re Headed to the Sun Belt
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Fewer Homeowners Are Listing as Spring Market Ends With a Whimper, Not a Bang
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Non-QM originations on pace for new post-crisis record in 2026
notables.what: Non-QM production is expected to reach $175 billion in 2026, compared to $108 billion in 2025.

notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Figure CEO says $300M prefunded securitization gives ‘added certainty’ to originators
